title: Garlicky Aerated Egyptian Beans Stir-Fry
description: A vegan-friendly brunch dish featuring Chinese long beans and a crispy char from broiling.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper. Add the trimmed and cut long beans and mix to coat.
Brush a baking sheet with vegan oil and arrange the long beans in a single layer.
Broil for 2-3 minutes or until the beans are slightly charred and crispy.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the diced red onion and cook for 2-3 minutes, until softened.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the cooked long beans and stir to combine with the garlic-onion mixture.
Cook for 1-2 minutes, until heated through.
Transfer the beans to a serving dish and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
